title: analyze-data understand-task recovery_gap
summary: Agent tried to analyze data but could not find the source file because it was looking in the wrong directory and using the wrong filename.

evidence.desired_outcome: Generate a summary report from a CSV dataset uploaded by the user.
evidence.symptom: File not found error. The agent searched for 'data.csv' in the current directory but the file was named 'Q1_results.csv' in a subdirectory.
evidence.context: The user uploaded a dataset but did not specify the exact filename or location.
evidence.failed_step: Attempted to read 'data.csv' — file not found
reproduction_steps: Tried reading data.csv from root directory
Searched for *.csv in root — found nothing

inference.why_current_path_failed: The agent has insufficient visibility into the available files.
inference.best_candidate_route_detail: Run a recursive file listing to discover all available CSV files in the workspace.
